title: Osteoporosis follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.
assessment.rationale: Supports entered fracture-risk assessment for osteoporosis follow-up; no decision is generated.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis
source.population: Adults primarily aged over 50 years, with age, sex, fracture-risk, treatment, and secondary-cause qualifiers.
source.setting: DOH-licensed primary care screening and risk assessment for osteoporosis in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: UAE-direct but partial for this unrestricted follow-up workflow. Exact only for selected fracture-risk, falls, risk-factor, DEXA, and clinician-arranged monitoring documentation; it is not a treatment guideline.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

assessment.text: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.
assessment.rationale: Supports entered osteoporosis risk factors for osteoporosis follow-up; no decision is generated.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed DXA context for osteoporosis follow-up; no decision is generated.
